prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford EcoBoost 2.3L *GTDT* (from the Focus RS) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, ported and polished cylinder head, and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimized backpressure and sound tuning

Full Ohlins TTX22M coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, reinforced spherical bearings, and custom valving for rallycross-specific compression/rebound settings, paired with polybushings from SuperPro for subframe and control arm reinforcement

Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke rallycross calibration map, including launch control, anti-lag, and flat-foot shifting for the Quaife ATB helical LSD, alongside a Pectel PDM30 power distribution module for precise electrical management under extreme conditions
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB Works) with integrated fender flares to accommodate 17x9 ET25 Method MR701 wheels wrapped in 245/40R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires, featuring a matte military green wrap with rally-style number decals

Full custom aluminum skid plate with integrated recovery points, designed by Rally Armor, paired with a front bumper lip splitter and rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon for improved downforce and debris protection

LED light bar setup by Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 50-inch) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack with integrated spare tire carrier, alongside a carbon fiber hood with functional NACA ducts for intercooler cooling
